field_values.action_summary: The Scarecrow asks the Queen to help rescue the Cowardly Lion from the poppy field. The Tin Woodman begins constructing a makeshift wooden truck using tree limbs and pegs, while the mice begin arriving in massive numbers, each carrying string to serve as harness lines.
field_values.camera_intent: Montage-style coverage of the Woodman building; Wide shots showing scale of approaching mouse army; Detail shots of mice carrying individual string pieces
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Assembly state of the wooden truck (limbs and pegs)
Increasing density of the mouse crowd
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH009_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the transition from crisis to organized mobilization through a montage of construction and mass arrival. The visual rhythm must shift from the singular desperation of the Scarecrow's plea to the collective industriousness of the Tin Woodman's building and the mouse army's influx.

## Required Cast
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- queen_of_the_field_mice
- Thousands of Field Mice

## Required Environments
- poppy_field_bed (Grassy field near river/poppy bed)

## Continuity Constraints
- Assembly state of the makeshift wooden truck (tree limbs and pegs).
- Increasing density of the mouse crowd throughout the scene.

## Beat List
- BT001: The Scarecrow's plea to the Queen.
- BT002: The Woodman begins construction of the truck.
- BT003: The Mouse Army arrives with string lines.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
